name: loop-mcp
description: Loop Engineering MCP: how to design, build, debug, and evaluate agentic AI loops — the observe→think→act→reflect cycle and its patterns (ReAct, plan-and-execute, reflexion/self-correction, the tool-use loop, RAG loops, multi-agent orchestration, evaluator-optimizer, human-in-the-loop, memory/state). design_loop picks an architecture for a task; debug_loop diagnoses runaway/thrashing/drifting loops; eval_loop shows how to measure it honestly (consistency ≠ correctness); myth_vs_reality debunks the 'more agents = better' folklore; and check_practice → practice_verdict verify fast-moving specifics via research. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
